justification: NorthCart's scan deduction reconciles exactly to POS: 13,600 units of MF-SN-001/MF-SN-002 scanned during PROMO-2026-Q1-001 (2025-10-06 to 2025-11-02) at the authorized $0.50/unit equals $6,800.00, within the $10,000 funding cap. The TPR performance requirement is supported by promoted retails in the scan data. Approve in full.
